overall.description: Third-person game footage of an armored character running through a foggy jungle canyon with dense vegetation and rocky cliffs, approaching a cave entrance with warm torchlight. The environment features atmospheric fog, blue-green color grading, and transitions from outdoor jungle to a lit cave shelter.

agents.ego_description: running steadily through the narrow jungle canyon between rocky cliff walls

entered.detail: tall moss-covered rock formation forming the left canyon wall
tall rocky cliff face forming the right boundary of the canyon
thick ferns and tropical plants covering the ground
distant pointed rock formation visible through the mist

segments.scene_description: The character runs through a narrow foggy canyon with dense jungle vegetation underfoot. Rocky cliffs rise on both sides while mist obscures the distant rock spires ahead. The lighting is dim and blue-tinted, creating a moody atmosphere.

events.description: warm orange campfire light becomes visible through the blue fog in the distance

agents.ego_description: running toward the distant light sources visible through the mist

entered.detail: warm orange glow of campfires or torches visible through the fog
dark opening in the rock face with light emanating from within

segments.scene_description: The canyon opens into a wider area where warm campfire lights pierce through the blue fog on the left. A cave entrance becomes visible in the distance ahead, glowing with interior light. The character continues running toward this destination.

events.description: cave entrance becomes prominent ahead with warm torchlight glowing from within

agents.ego_description: running across rocky terrain toward the illuminated cave entrance

entered.detail: bright warm light sources at the cave entrance

segments.scene_description: The ground becomes rockier as the character approaches the cave. The entrance looms larger, framed by rocky overhangs and illuminated by warm torchlight from within. The jungle vegetation thins out as the cave mouth dominates the view ahead.

events.description: character enters the cave shelter leaving the foggy jungle behind

agents.ego_description: entering the cave shelter, transitioning from the foggy exterior to the lit interior

entered.detail: rocky cave walls illuminated by warm torchlight
rough stone surfaces of the cave entrance

segments.scene_description: The character enters the cave, leaving the foggy jungle behind. The lighting shifts to warm artificial torchlight illuminating the rocky cave walls. The space becomes enclosed as the character moves into the shelter, with the cave interior opening up ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dim, foggy jungle canyon that gradually transitions into the warm, enclosed shelter of a lit cave. It begins with the character running through a narrow passage of dense vegetation and towering rocky cliffs under a moody, blue-tinted mist. As the canyon opens into a wider expanse, warm campfire lights begin to pierce through the blue fog, drawing the character toward a glowing cave entrance in the distance. The scene then shifts as the ground becomes rockier and the jungle vegetation thins, allowing the torch-lit mouth of the cave to dominate the view. Finally, the camera follows the character inside, leaving the foggy exterior behind as the lighting transforms into a warm glow illuminating the rocky interior walls.
